title: angraecum kotschyi
intro: Angraecum kotschyi, also known as the orchid tree or African orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Angraecum kotschyi include its potential to treat fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used to create a decoction that can be used to treat various health conditions.
